likely_response.local: A Rua Direita fica no centro histórico.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH ROOUH dee-RAY-tuh FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Rua Direita is in the historic center.

responses.english: Rua Direita is in the historic center.
responses.phonetic: AH ROOUH dee-RAY-tuh FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo.
responses.local: A Rua Direita fica no centro histórico.

phrases.text_local: Podes recomendar um restaurante típico aqui perto?
phrases.pronunciation: POD-eesh rek-oh-men-DAR um res-tow-RAN-tee TEE-pee-koo a-KEE pair-too?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao lojista na Rua Direita ou ao guia do castelo; eles conhecem bem as opções locais.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW loo-ZHEESH-tuh NUH ROOUH dee-RAY-tuh OHW OW GEEUH DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG UHSH awp-SOHNYSH loo-KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the shopkeeper on Rua Direita or the castle guide; they know the local options well.

responses.english: Ask the shopkeeper on Rua Direita or the castle guide; they know the local options well.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW loo-ZHEESH-tuh NUH ROOUH dee-RAY-tuh OHW OW GEEUH DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG UHSH awp-SOHNYSH loo-KEYESH.
responses.local: Pergunte ao lojista na Rua Direita ou ao guia do castelo; eles conhecem bem as opções locais.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira do castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Castelo de Óbidos. O guia do castelo indica a bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW kuhsh-TEH-loo DIH AW-bee-doosh. AW GEEUH DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo een-DEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Castle of Óbidos. The castle guide will point out the ticket office.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Castle of Óbidos. The castle guide will point out the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW kuhsh-TEH-loo DIH AW-bee-doosh. AW GEEUH DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo een-DEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Castelo de Óbidos. O guia do castelo indica a bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the castle museum ticket kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque de bilhetes do castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: Tickets are sold outside the castle entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main entrance gate is
phrases.cultural_note: Porta da Vila is the iconic main gate of Óbidos, featuring a tiled chapel and a traditional azulejo panel.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, é a Porta da Vila.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, EH AH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH VEE-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's the Porta da Vila.

responses.english: Good morning, it's the Porta da Vila.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, EH AH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH VEE-luh.
responses.local: Bom dia, é a Porta da Vila.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Fonte da Vila is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Fonte da Vila exatamente?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-ka-wuh FON-chee duh VI-la e-za-TA-men-chee
phrases.cultural_note: The fountain is a historic landmark near the main square.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica na praça central da vila.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH PRAH-suh sayngt-RAHL DUH VEE-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is in the central square of the village.

responses.english: Good morning, it is in the central square of the village.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH PRAH-suh sayngt-RAHL DUH VEE-luh.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica na praça central da vila.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o quiosque de bilhetes do museu do castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh DOO moo-ZEHOO DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira do Castelo de Óbidos.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo DIH AW-bee-doosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the ticket office of the Castle of Óbidos.

responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo DIH AW-bee-doosh.
responses.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira do Castelo de Óbidos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main shopping street is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a rua principal de compras?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ROOUH preen-see-PAHL DIH KOHMP-ruhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Rua Direita hosts most souvenir and local shops.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, é a Rua Direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, EH AH ROOUH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is Rua Direita.

responses.english: Good morning, it is Rua Direita.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, EH AH ROOUH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, é a Rua Direita.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada da Porta da Vila?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH VEE-luh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Porta da Vila.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH VEE-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Porta da Vila entrance.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Porta da Vila entrance.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH VEE-luh.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the artisan market stalls are
phrases.text_local: Onde encontro as barracas do mercado artesanal?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee en-KON-troo ahsh-ba-HA-kahs doo mer-KA-doo ar-CHE-sa-NAW
phrases.cultural_note: Artisan stalls often operate near historic sites on weekends.

likely_response.local: Pode perguntar a um lojista na Rua Direita ou ao guia do castelo.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR AH OONNG loo-ZHEESH-tuh NUH ROOUH dee-RAY-tuh OHW OW GEEUH DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask a shopkeeper on Rua Direita or the castle guide.

responses.phonetic: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR AH OONNG loo-ZHEESH-tuh NUH ROOUH dee-RAY-tuh OHW OW GEEUH DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy ginjinha cups
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar copos de ginjinha?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR KOH-poosh DIH zheen-ZHEE-nyuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Ginjinha is traditionally served in chocolate cups sold locally.

likely_response.local: Na Rua Direita, junto aos vendedores de ginjinha.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH ROOUH dee-RAY-tuh, ZHOONNG-too UHOOSH vayng-dih-DOH-rihsh DIH zheen-ZHEE-nyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: At Rua Direita, near the ginjinha vendors.

responses.english: At Rua Direita, near the ginjinha vendors.

responses.local: Na Rua Direita, junto aos vendedores de ginjinha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the village fountain is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a fonte da aldeia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH FOHNG-tih DUH ahl-DAYUH?
phrases.cultural_note: The fountain is a central gathering spot near the church.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Fonte da Vila.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH FOHNG-tih DUH VEE-luh.
